stepsSummary: Add water via quick buttons and custom amount, then undo one action.
expectedSummary: Water total and percentage update immediately and undo works correctly.
errorMessage:
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://localhost:4173/
Call log:
  - navigating to "http://localhost:4173/", waiting until "load"
summary: BUG: UAT-004 Hydration quick-add + custom ml - Error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://localhost:4173/
reproSteps: Open Today panel and confirm initial water state.
Add custom water value and submit.
Use Undo on last hydration action.
Verify displayed total and percentage are coherent.
expected: Water total and percentage update immediately and undo works correctly.
recommendation: Fix the failing Daily Tracking flow and add a regression assertion for this scenario.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario UAT-004 completes without blocking errors.
Verify: Hydration values update after each action.
Verify: Undo reverses the most recent hydration mutation.
